initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_quantity) AS sum_ss_quantity,
    SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS sum_sr_return_quantity,
    SUM(cs_quantity) AS sum_cs_quantity
FROM store_sales
JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
JOIN store_returns ON ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk 
    AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk 
    AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
JOIN date_dim d2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
JOIN catalog_sales ON sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk 
    AND sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk
JOIN date_dim d3 ON cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
WHERE d1.d_moy = 9 
    AND d1.d_year = 1999
    AND d2.d_moy BETWEEN 9 AND 12 
    AND d2.d_year = 1999
    AND d3.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
GROUP BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
ORDER BY i_item_id ASC, s_store_id ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT
  i_item_id,
  i_item_desc,
  s_store_id,
  s_store_name,
  SUM(ss_quantity) AS sum_ss_quantity,
  SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS sum_sr_return_quantity,
  SUM(cs_quantity) AS sum_cs_quantity
FROM store_sales
JOIN store_returns ON ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk
  AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk
  AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
JOIN catalog_sales ON sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk
  AND sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN date_dim d2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
JOIN date_dim d3 ON cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
WHERE d1.d_moy = 9
  AND d1.d_year = 1999
  AND d2.d_moy BETWEEN 9 AND 12
  AND d2.d_year = 1999
  AND d3.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
GROUP BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
ORDER BY i_item_id ASC, s_store_id ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_quantity) AS sum_ss_quantity,
    SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS sum_sr_return_quantity,
    SUM(cs_quantity) AS sum_cs_quantity
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store_returns ON 
        ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk AND 
        ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND 
        ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
    JOIN catalog_sales ON 
        sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk AND 
        sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    JOIN date_dim d3 ON cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
WHERE 
    d1.d_moy = 9 AND 
    d1.d_year = 1999 AND 
    d2.d_moy BETWEEN 9 AND 12 AND 
    d2.d_year = 1999 AND 
    d3.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id, 
    i_item_desc, 
    s_store_id, 
    s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    i_item_id ASC, 
    s_store_id ASC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(ss_quantity) AS sum_ss_quantity,
    SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS sum_sr_return_quantity,
    SUM(cs_quantity) AS sum_cs_quantity
FROM
    store_sales,
    store_returns,
    catalog_sales,
    date_dim d1,
    date_dim d2,
    date_dim d3,
    store,
    item
WHERE
    ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    AND ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    AND ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    AND ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk
    AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk
    AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
    AND sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    AND sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk
    AND sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk
    AND cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
    AND d1.d_moy = 9
    AND d1.d_year = 1999
    AND d2.d_moy BETWEEN 9 AND 12
    AND d2.d_year = 1999
    AND d3.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
GROUP BY
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name
ORDER BY
    i_item_id ASC,
    s_store_id ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT
  i_item_id,
  i_item_desc,
  s_store_id,
  s_store_name,
  SUM(ss_quantity) AS sum_ss_quantity,
  SUM(sr_return_quantity) AS sum_sr_return_quantity,
  SUM(cs_quantity) AS sum_cs_quantity
FROM
  store_sales,
  store_returns,
  catalog_sales,
  date_dim d1,
  date_dim d2,
  date_dim d3,
  store,
  item
WHERE
  ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
  AND ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
  AND ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
  AND ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk
  AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk
  AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
  AND sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
  AND sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk
  AND sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk
  AND cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
  AND d1.d_moy = 9
  AND d1.d_year = 1999
  AND d2.d_moy BETWEEN 9 AND 12
  AND d2.d_year = 1999
  AND d3.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
GROUP BY
  i_item_id,
  i_item_desc,
  s_store_id,
  s_store_name
ORDER BY
  i_item_id ASC,
  s_store_id ASC
LIMIT 100;
